data.title: Bitcoin to outperform gold in second half of 2025: JP Morgan
data.description:
Gold has been losing steam recently after it raced to record highs due to geopolitical and economic uncertainties, including tariffs. Bitcoin has been the winner, with gold being the loser in a hedge trade against currencies. The increasing number of US states and companies buying bitcoin will be another catalyst
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-to-outperform-gold-in-second-half-of-2025-jp-morgan/

data.title: Fed’s Powell warns the U.S. economy could face persistent supply shocks
data.description:
Fed Chair Jerome Powell just quietly admitted the economy was entering a period of more frequent and potentially more persistent "supply shocks. ”

data.title: Coinbase Faces SEC Probe Over User Data Misreporting
data.description:
SEC investigates Coinbase's user data claims, focuses on 100 million user statistic amid regulatory scrutiny.
source: https://coincu.com/337813-coinbase-sec-user-data-probe

data.title: Wisconsin Investment Board Sells Bitcoin ETF Holdings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Wisconsin Investment Board has divested its holdings in a Bitcoin ETF. The board had previously invested $321 million in the Bitcoin exchange-traded fund, as revealed in documents filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Judge Torres rejects Ripple SEC settlement motion
data.description:
Judge Analisa Torres denied the joint motion filed by the SEC and Ripple for an indicative ruling.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/judge-torres-rejects-ripple-sec-settlement-motion

data.title: Solana network activity surge and ‘megaphone’ chart pattern set $210 SOL price target
data.description:
Key Takeaways:Solana formed a megaphone chart pattern with a potential $210 price target. Solana’s ecosystem growth highlights renewed investor interest with a $4 billion realized cap increase and 731 million transactions. Solana (SOL) price tested its key resistance at $180 earlier this week, but the altcoin failed to establish a position above the level. Over the past few days, SOL has consolidated above the $170 mark, but prices have dropped 5
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/solana-network-activity-surge-and-megaphone-chart-pattern-set-210-sol-price-target?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Powell Says US May Be Entering A Period Of More Supply Shocks
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, May 15, 2025- US Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell said on Thursday that the US may be entering a period of more frequent supply shocks and volatile inflation, with economic uncertainty. “A critical question is how to foster a broader understanding of the uncertainty that the economy generally faces,” Powell said in his […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/powell-says-us-may-be-entering-a-period-of-more-supply-shocks

data.title: 127,570 Active DOGE Addresses Onchain: Catalyst For $1 Dogecoin Price Breakout?
data.description:
Key Insights: Dogecoin (DOGE) has recorded significant on-chain activity in the last 48 hours. Notably, DOGE price experienced an upward climb amid bullish ecosystem sentiment, and the number of active addresses suggests that the meme coin could soar further.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/15/127570-active-doge-addresses-onchain-catalyst-for-1-dogecoin-price-breakout/

data.title: XRP Moves Into Key Range Against Bitcoin As 3 Major Targets Show Up
data.description:
XRP has re-entered a pivotal trading range against Bitcoin (BTC), stirring up excitement as technical signals suggest a potential breakout. This move is reinforcing its bullish position, highlighting three major price targets that could confirm a larger macro rally. XRP Sets Sights On Key Targets Against Bitcoin After months of consolidation, the XRP/BTC trading pair is now back inside a critical triangle formation, which market expert Egrag Crypto has identified as a key price range to watch for potential breakout or breakdown moves. The analyst shared a short-term XRP/BTC chart on X (formerly Twitter), explaining how important this price range is for the trading pair to hit new bullish targets and reach even larger goals
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-key-range-against-bitcoin/

data.title: Pavel Durov calls WhatsApp ‘cheap copycat,’ launches $50K contest to showcase Telegram’s superiority
data.description:
Telegram’s founder Pavel Durov has taken direct aim at Meta-owned WhatsApp, calling it a “cheap copycat” and accusing it of launching smear campaigns against his platform. His May 15 comments accompanied the announcement of a new $50,000 contest to showcase Telegram’s features. The competition will run until May 26
source: https://cryptoslate.com/pavel-durov-calls-whatsapp-cheap-copycat-launches-50k-contest-to-showcase-telegrams-superiority/

data.title: Fresh scandal rocks Movement Labs, facing lawsuit for $50M promised in shady deals
data.description:
Movement Labs, the World Liberty Financial-backed crypto project, is facing heavy backlash and internal dissent as quiet promises of large token stakes made to early insiders have come to light. The previously undisclosed deals have raised fresh questions about who is truly running things behind closed doors. NEW: Movement Labs — the crypto startup backed […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/movement-labs-lawsuit-for-50m-shady-deals/

data.title: House Democrats Warn of ‘Shocking’ Corruption, Demand Trump Crypto SARs by May 30
data.description:
House Democrats have asked Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent to unseal suspicious activity reports dating from January 2023 that involve Trump-branded crypto tokens, World Liberty Financial, WinRed and America PAC, saying transparency is needed to assess influence-peddling and national-security concerns.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/house-democrats-trump-crypto-sars/

data.title: Robinhood Rival eToro Goes Live on Nasdaq After Raising $620,000,000 in IPO
data.description:
Shares of the Israel-based retail trading firm eToro are surging after the Robinhood rival went public on Wednesday. The firm’s new ETOR shares, now trading on the Nasdaq Exchange, are up more than 30% on their first day of trading and are priced at $67. 66 at time of writing
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/15/robinhood-rival-etoro-goes-live-on-nasdaq-after-raising-620000000-in-ipo/

data.title: Coinbase leak prompts KYC criticism from crypto execs
data.description:
A growing number of crypto players are attacking KYC protocols after Coinbase revealed its support staff had leaked credentials.
source: https://protos.com/coinbase-leak-prompts-kyc-criticism-from-crypto-execs/

data.title: Nebraska lawmakers unanimously pass bill to regulate large-scale crypto mining
data.description:
Nebraska lawmakers unanimously approve LB 526, a bill regulating large-scale crypto-mining facilities.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nebraska-pass-bill-to-regulate-crypto-mining/

data.title: BNB Drops Below 650 USDT with a 0.44% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 15, 2025, 18:49 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 650 USDT and is now trading at 649.909973 USDT, with a narrowed 0.44% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Sonic Labs abandons Wintermute, seeks new market maker
data.description:
Sonic announced it is ending its contract with the Wintermute market maker. The wallets of Wintermute sold 3M S tokens in the past 24 hours, sending the market price lower.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sonic-labs-abandons-wintermute/
